name: Lil Mabu
description: '''Matthew Peter DeLuca''' (born April 4, 2005), known professionally as '''Lil Mabu''', is an American [[Rapping|rapper]] from [[Manhattan]], New York City. He first gained some recognition in 2020 for his song "Miss Me", earned further recognition with the 2022 song "No Snitching", and became best known for his 2023 single "[[Mathematical Disrespect]]", which entered the top 50 of the [[Billboard Hot 100|''Billboard'' Hot 100]].
